[OMD_Email_Broadcast_v5.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29035400/OMD_Email_Broadcast_v5.html)
# OMDCA<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1">
<title>OMD Canada — Weekly Diamond List</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300;1,400&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{background:#d4d0cb;font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;padding:32px 16px;min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center}
.wrap{width:100%;max-width:600px}

/* Personal intro — looks hand-typed */
.personal{
  background:#ffffff;
  border-radius:4px;
  padding:28px 32px 24px;
  margin-bottom:2px;
  border-bottom:3px solid #0d2d5e;
}
.personal .greeting{
  font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:300;
  color:#1a1510;line-height:1.9;
  white-space:pre-line;
}
.personal .greeting strong{font-weight:500;color:#0d2d5e}
.personal .sig{
  margin-top:22px;padding-top:18px;border-top:1px solid #e8e4de;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;
}
.personal .sig img{width:38px;height:auto;border-radius:3px}
.personal .sig-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}
.personal .sig-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#0d2d5e;letter-spacing:.04em}
.personal .sig-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:300;color:#8a7d70;letter-spacing:.06em}
.personal .sig-contact{font-size:11px;color:#4e8ec8;text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.02em}

/* Design card below */
.card{
  background:#e4e0db;
  overflow:hidden;
  border-radius:4px;
  box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(13,45,94,0.14);
}

/* Hero image */
.hero{position:relative;height:280px;overflow:hidden}
.hero img{
  width:100%;height:100%;
  object-fit:cover;object-position:center 88%;
  filter:brightness(1.15) contrast(1.04);
}
.hero-ov{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(13,45,94,0.78) 0%,rgba(13,45,94,0.4) 35%,transparent 65%),
    linear-gradient(to top,rgba(10,34,72,0.7) 0%,transparent 50%);
}
.hero-content{
  position:absolute;top:0;left:0;bottom:0;
  padding:28px 30px;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;
  max-width:280px;
}
.eyebrow{font-size:8px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.24em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7dbde8;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
.eyebrow::after{content:'';width:20px;height:1px;background:#4e8ec8}
.hero-h{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:32px;font-weight:300;line-height:1.1;color:#fff;letter-spacing:.01em}
.hero-h em{font-style:italic;color:#7dbde8}
.hero-rule{width:28px;height:2px;background:#4e8ec8;margin:12px 0 10px}
.hero-sub{font-size:10px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);line-height:1.8}

/* Header logo strip */
.card-header{
  background:#0d2d5e;
  padding:14px 24px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  border-bottom:2px solid #4e8ec8;
}
.card-header img{width:38px;height:auto;border-radius:3px}
.card-header-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;margin-left:10px;flex:1}
.cht1{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#fff}
.cht2{font-size:8.5px;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7dbde8;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px}
.week-badge{font-size:8px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#4e8ec8;border:1px solid rgba(78,142,200,0.4);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:2px;white-space:nowrap}

/* Body */
.card-body{padding:28px 28px 22px}
.section-lbl{font-size:8px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#8a7d70;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.section-lbl::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:#ccc8c2}

.features{display:flex;gap:0;margin-bottom:22px;border:1px solid #ccc8c2;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden}
.feat{flex:1;padding:12px 10px;text-align:center;border-right:1px solid #ccc8c2}
.feat:last-child{border-right:none}
.feat-icon{font-size:16px;color:#4e8ec8;margin-bottom:5px}
.feat-label{font-size:8px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b5f47;line-height:1.5}

/* Big CTA */
.cta-main{
  display:block;text-decoration:none;
  background:#0d2d5e;
  padding:16px 20px;border-radius:3px;
  border-bottom:3px solid #4e8ec8;
  margin-bottom:10px;
  text-align:center;
}
.cta-top{font-size:9px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#7dbde8;margin-bottom:4px}
.cta-main-text{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:300;font-style:italic;color:#fff;letter-spacing:.02em}
.cta-arrow{font-size:9px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-top:3px}

.cta-row{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:20px}
.cta-s{flex:1;display:block;text-decoration:none;text-align:center;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid #ccc8c2;font-size:9px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#3d3028}
.cta-lab{flex:1;display:block;text-decoration:none;text-align:center;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid #9ec5e8;background:rgba(78,142,200,0.08);font-size:9px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#0d2d5e}

.note{font-size:10.5px;font-weight:300;color:#8a7d70;line-height:1.8;text-align:center;letter-spacing:.02em}
.note a{color:#0d2d5e;text-decoration:none;font-weight:400}

/* Footer */
.card-footer{
  background:#0a2248;border-top:2px solid #4e8ec8;
  padding:16px 24px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;
}
.footer-tag{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.35);letter-spacing:.08em}
.footer-addr{font-size:9px;color:#7dbde8;letter-spacing:.06em;text-align:right;line-height:1.7}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="wrap">

  <!-- PERSONAL NOTE — looks like a real email -->
  <div class="personal">
    <div class="greeting">Hello,

Our team wanted to share this week's diamond selection with you. We just updated our inventory with a great new selection of stones.

Check our newly added diamonds. <strong>Natural and lab grown available</strong>, all GIA certified.

We are happy to answer any questions or help with any call!</div>

    <div class="sig">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="OMD Logo">
      <div class="sig-text">
        <span class="sig-name">The OMD Canada Team</span>
        <span class="sig-title">Ofer Mizrahi Diamonds of Canada</span>
        <a href="mailto:snait@om-diamonds.com" class="sig-contact">Contact Us</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- DESIGN CARD -->
  <div class="card">

    <!-- Logo header -->
    <div class="card-header">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="OMD">
      <div class="card-header-text">
        <span class="cht1">Ofer Mizrahi Diamonds</span>
        <span class="cht2">
          <svg width="18" height="11" viewBox="0 0 20 13" fill="none">
            <rect x="0" y="0" width="5" height="13" fill="#D52B1E"/>
            <rect x="5" y="0" width="10" height="13" fill="#fff"/>
            <rect x="15" y="0" width="5" height="13" fill="#D52B1E"/>
            <path d="M10 2.2L10.6 4.2L12.8 3.6L11.8 5L13.4 5.2L11.8 6L12.3 7.8L10 6.8L7.7 7.8L8.2 6L6.6 5.2L8.2 5L7.2 3.6L9.4 4.2Z" fill="#D52B1E"/>
            <line x1="10" y1="6.8" x2="10" y2="10.5" stroke="#D52B1E" stroke-width="0.8"/>
          </svg>
          of Canada
        </span>
      </div>
      <span class="week-badge">This Week's List</span>
    </div>

    <!-- Hero photo -->
    <div class="hero">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Diamond ring">
      <div class="hero-ov"></div>
      <div class="hero-content">
        <div class="eyebrow">Weekly Selection</div>
        <h2 class="hero-h">This Week's<br><em>Diamond</em><br>Selection</h2>
        <div class="hero-rule"></div>
        <div class="hero-sub">Natural &amp; Lab Grown<br>GIA Certified</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Body -->
    <div class="card-body">
      <div class="section-lbl">Why OMD Canada</div>

      <div class="features">
        <div class="feat">
          <div class="feat-icon">✦</div>
          <div class="feat-label">Largest<br>Memo House</div>
        </div>
        <div class="feat">
          <div class="feat-icon">✦</div>
          <div class="feat-label">Personal<br>Service</div>
        </div>
        <div class="feat">
          <div class="feat-icon">✦</div>
          <div class="feat-label">Overnight<br>Shipping</div>
        </div>
        <div class="feat">
          <div class="feat-icon">✦</div>
          <div class="feat-label">GIA<br>Certified</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section-lbl">View Inventory</div>

      <a class="cta-main" href="https://omd-ca.github.io/OMDCA/" target="_blank">
        <div class="cta-top">Click to open full list</div>
        <div class="cta-main-text">View This Week's Diamond Selection</div>
        <div class="cta-arrow">omd-ca.github.io/OMDCA</div>
      </a>

      <div class="cta-row">
        <a class="cta-s" href="https://om-diamonds.com/webapp/natural-diamonds/search?priceMode=2&productType=diamond&fromNewFilterScreen=false&filterSplitStep=1&sectionName=Single%20Stones&breadCrumbLabel=Stone%20Search&enterSecondFlow=false&saved_search=%7B%22featured%22%3A%22false%22%2C%22clarities%22%3A%5B%5D%2C%22cutGrades%22%3A%5B%5D%2C%22polishes%22%3A%5B%5D%2C%22symmetries%22%3A%5B%5D%2C%22total_or_price_per_carat%22%3A%22%22%2C%22argyle%22%3A%7B%7D%2C%22pair%22%3A%22other%22%7D" target="_blank">💎 Full Inventory</a>
        <a class="cta-lab" href="https://www.om-diamonds.com/webapp/natural-diamonds/search?priceMode=2&productType=labGrown" target="_blank">🧪 Lab Grown Inventory</a>
      </div>

      <p class="note">
        Questions? <a href="mailto:snait@om-diamonds.com">Contact us</a> &nbsp;·&nbsp;
        <a href="https://www.om-diamonds.com/omd-canada" target="_blank">om-diamonds.com/omd-canada</a>
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <div class="card-footer">
      <span class="footer-tag">One World. One Source. One Family.</span>
      <div class="footer-addr">
        820–736 Granville St, Vancouver BC<br>
        www.om-diamonds.com
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
